top_signals.title: Bitcoin sentiment reaches most ‘lopsided positive’ ratio for 2026: Santiment
top_signals.summary: Crypto sentiment platform Santiment warned that the two biggest spikes in social media bullishness around Bitcoin have previously been followed by short-term price pullbacks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Wall Street bulls bet US stocks rally will defy bubble fears
top_signals.summary: Investors and strategists shrug off worries that markets could be overheating by betting on huge gains for AI-linked shares
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Military Metals sinks on revoked Slovak antimony project licence
top_signals.summary: Trojarova, located near the capital city Bratislava, represents an advanced exploration stage project with considerable mining history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Palo Alto GlobalProtect VPN auth bypass flaw now exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: Palo Alto Networks is warning that hackers are now exploiting a PAN-OS GlobalProtect authentication bypass flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-0257, in attacks attempting to breach corporate networks. [...]

top_signals.title: Deep Sea Minerals to list on Nasdaq
top_signals.summary: The company currently has no active projects but aims to secure a portfolio of seabed mining concessions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: IMF Chief, Venezuelan Officials Hold Talks on Economy Issues
top_signals.summary: International Monetary Fund Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva and Venezuelan economic official Calixto Ortega held talks in Washington, the IMF head’s first in-person meeting with country’s authorities since the fund resumed formal engagement with Venezuela last month.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin dip buyers curb selling but questionable spot, futures volumes highlight weakness
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin dip buyers are present near range lows, and new leveraged longs opened in the zone but the volumes lack the size needed to reverse the downtrend.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Pulsar Helium acquires 1,360 acres for $2.4M at Topaz project in Minnesota
top_signals.summary: Topaz is one of the leading primary helium discoveries in the US, the company said.

top_signals.summary: Fueled by the C$12 million raised in March, Group Eleven has more than tripled the size of its planned drilling program for PG West.
